title: You should use Psalm 5.8 to make physical provision (EARTH) requests from Yeshua because of Satan blocking your obedience
body:
Psalms 5:8
LEB O Yahweh, lead me in your righteousness because of my enemies; make straight before me your way.
HB2 5:9 יְהוָה נְחֵנִי בְצִדְקָתֶךָ לְמַעַן שׁוֹרְרָי הושר הַיְשַׁר לְפָנַי דַּרְכֶּךָ:
labels: teach me how to use the Bible
🙋🏻‍♂️👨🏻‍🏫🙏 HOW DO I PRAY? TEACH ME TO PRAY?
👨🏻‍🔬🧬🙏🩸🕊️ THE SCIENCE OF PRAYER | PRAY = SACRIFICE
